# WellAgora — Impact Marketplace
> Regional knowledge-sharing community platform for sustainability, well-being, and resilience.

## About
WellAgora is a community platform connecting local experts with people interested in sustainability, crafts, gastronomy, gardening, well-being, and community building. Based in the Káli Basin, Hungary, WellAgora enables experts to share workshops, courses, and experiences while sponsors support local programs.

## Key Features
- **Marketplace**: Browse workshops, courses, and experiences from local experts
- **Events**: Community events including cooking, gardening, hiking, and more
- **Expert Profiles**: Verified local experts sharing their knowledge
- **Sponsorship**: Organizations can sponsor programs and experts
- **Multilingual**: Available in Hungarian (hu), English (en), and German (de)

## Content Categories
Lifestyle, Craft, Gastronomy, Well-Being & Resilience, Hiking, Gardening, Heritage, Volunteering, Market, Community, Sport, Culture, Family

## URLs
- Homepage: https://wellagora.hu/
- Marketplace: https://wellagora.hu/piacer
- Events: https://wellagora.hu/esemenyek
- Community: https://wellagora.hu/community
- Knowledge Base: https://wellagora.hu/blog
- FAQ: https://wellagora.hu/gyik
- Partners: https://wellagora.hu/partners
- Contact: https://wellagora.hu/contact

## Technical
- Built with React, TypeScript, Vite, TailwindCSS
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Storage)
- Hosting: Nethely.hu (Hungary)
- Domain: wellagora.hu

## Contact
- Email: info@wellagora.hu
- Location: Káli Basin, Hungary
